eatonFireRebuildAlternative: 2022 CBC editions available as alternative for Eaton Fire rebuild parcels per PMC Chapter 14.04
fireAgencyContact: Nicole Berry, Supervising Fire Plans Examiner
seismicNote: Raymond Fault is part of the Sierra Madre Fault system and is an Alquist-Priolo Earthquake Fault Zone. Parcels in AP zone require geological investigation per CBC §1803.5.12.
historicDistrictNote: Certificate of Appropriateness (CoA) required before building permit for exterior alterations visible from public ROW in landmark districts. Governed by PMC Chapter 17.62. Review by Design Commission (major) or planning staff (minor).
historicExemptions: exterior work not visible from public ROW
wildfireNote: VHFHSZ covers hillside/foothill areas along San Gabriel Mountain foothills (Linda Vista, upper Arroyo Seco, Altadena-adjacent). Flat urban core is non-FHSZ. 2025 FHSZ maps adopted.
hillsidePermitNote: Hillside Development Permit required for grading/construction in designated hillside areas — planning permit separate from building permit.
utilityNote: Municipally owned utility — NOT SCE territory. Solar interconnection through PWP. SolarApp+ participating city. AB 2188 compliant.
aduStandardPlans: Expired 2025-12-31. Available only for Eaton Fire rebuild parcels as of 2026.
